reviews.comment:
Es el peor automovil club del pais,  pesima la atencion, minimo 3 o 4 veces al año paso por ahi y siempre es pesima la atencion. Tarea para el automovil club, ver que pasa en Bernardo de Hirigoyen

(Translated by Google)
It's the worst automobile club in the country; the service is terrible. I pass by at least three or four times a year, and the service is always awful. The automobile club needs to look into what's happening on Bernardo de Hirigoyen Street.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN2NktuN21RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Este lugar es un oasis en la ruta, donde la eficiencia y la amabilidad se encuentran. El personal es atento y capacitado, haciendo que cada parada sea una experiencia agradable. La limpieza y la organización son notables, lo que refleja el compromiso con la calidad. Un punto de referencia confiable para cualquier viaje, donde puedes recargar combustible y energías para seguir adelante.

(Translated by Google)
This place is an oasis on the road, where efficiency and friendliness meet. The staff is attentive and knowledgeable, making every stop a pleasant experience. The cleanliness and organization are remarkable, reflecting a commitment to quality. A reliable landmark for any journey, where you can refuel and recharge your energy to keep going.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2tSSExXTXlSazVuTlZScVVsUjVjM0l0TkV4Nk5WRRAB

reviews.comment:
Como todos los ACA la atención es impecable y en especial la de Claudia que nos asesoró para utilizar el hospedaje, que resultó ser muy bueno. Muy atentos!!

(Translated by Google)
As with all ACA hotels, the service is impeccable, especially Claudia, who advised us on how to use the accommodation, which turned out to be excellent. Very attentive!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2toWVMxVkpUMk0zWm1sb1VWTkNVbk5qYm5BeFdsRRAB

reviews.comment:
Llegamos con un grupo desde Brasil, en la estación y nos encontramos con el baño en pésimas condiciones, no se soportó el mal olor y muy sucio, quisimos cargar agua para el mate y no tenían fichas para la maquina de agua caliente.

(Translated by Google)
We arrived with a group from Brazil, and at the station we found the bathroom in terrible condition; the bad smell was unbearable and it was very dirty. We wanted to get water for mate and they didn't have tokens for the hot water machine.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21adk1IZHRRVTAwVDA1MU5GVTFTRGxUZG5VeVRsRRAB
